membership_plans.name: Basic Fitness
membership_plans.description: Access to the fitness floor and locker rooms during staffed hours. Does not include pool, classes, or court reservations.

membership_plans.name: Standard Fitness + Classes
membership_plans.description: Unlimited access to the fitness floor and standard group fitness classes. Pool and courts not included.

membership_plans.name: Off-Peak Pool Access
membership_plans.description: Access to the pool and fitness floor during off-peak hours only. Group classes and courts not included.

membership_plans.name: Pool + Classes Value
membership_plans.description: Best-value access to the pool, fitness floor, and unlimited group classes with month-to-month flexibility.

membership_plans.name: Premium All-Access
membership_plans.description: Full access to all club facilities including pool, unlimited classes, squash courts, and sauna.

membership_plans.name: Family All-Access
membership_plans.description: All-access membership for up to two adults and two children, including childcare, pool, classes, and court reservations.

membership_plans.name: Court Access Add-On
membership_plans.description: Add squash and racquet court reservation privileges to a qualifying base membership. Pool not included.

membership_plans.name: Student Pool Pass
membership_plans.description: Discounted membership for students with full pool and fitness floor access. Classes and courts are extra.

membership_plans.name: Student Pool + Classes
membership_plans.description: Evening and weekend access to the pool, fitness floor, and group classes for students.

membership_plans.name: Senior Daytime Fitness
membership_plans.description: Discounted daytime access for members 60+ including select low-impact group classes.

membership_plans.name: Elite Performance
membership_plans.description: High-touch membership with priority court bookings, extended pool hours, and performance testing.

membership_plans.name: Corporate Wellness
membership_plans.description: Subsidized membership for employees of partner companies, including classes and pool access during standard hours.

membership_plans.name: Legacy Pool-Only (Archived)
membership_plans.description: Grandfathered pool-only membership no longer offered to new members.

personal_trainers.bio: Jordan is a strength specialist with over 8 years of experience helping clients master barbell fundamentals and build confidence on the weight floor. Jordan focuses heavily on proper technique, progressive overload, and sustainable programming for beginners through intermediate lifters.

Avery combines strength training and mobility work to help clients move better and lift stronger. With a background in collegiate athletics, Avery emphasizes technique, posture, and joint health while still delivering challenging workouts.

Morgan works with intermediate to advanced lifters who want to push their strength to the next level. Sessions include detailed video review, targeted accessory work, and periodized programming tailored to busy schedules.

Riley designs high-energy HIIT and conditioning sessions for clients who want efficient, results-driven workouts. Expect clear coaching on intensity zones, safe progressions, and plenty of motivation.
Taylor is a running and endurance coach who balances form work, pacing strategies, and strength training for runners. Taylor works with new runners through recreational racers looking to set PRs.
Casey focuses on total fitness: strength, mobility, and sustainable habit change. Ideal for clients who want a well-rounded program that supports weight loss, energy, and long-term health.
Jamie specializes in sustainable weight loss programs that combine strength training, cardio, and realistic nutrition strategies. Perfect for beginners who want clear guidance and accountability.
Alex has a background in exercise science and works closely with clients returning from injury. Sessions emphasize controlled strength work, mobility, and movement pattern retraining.

programs.name: 6-Week Evening Beginner Running Program
programs.description: Coach-led beginner running program focused on run-walk intervals, proper form, and building up to a continuous 30-minute run. Meets twice weekly on weeknights after 6:00 PM.

programs.name: 6-Week Morning Beginner Running Group
programs.description: Introductory running group that meets early mornings to build endurance safely with a mix of walking and easy running.

programs.name: 8-Week Intermediate 10K Prep
programs.description: Structured 10K prep program including tempo runs, intervals, and strength for runners. Recommended for those already running 3 miles comfortably.

programs.name: 12-Week Half Marathon Training
programs.description: Advanced half marathon program combining race-pace workouts, long runs, and strength training guidance.

programs.name: 8-Week Weight Loss Foundations
programs.description: Comprehensive weight loss program with weekly group workouts, habit coaching, and check-ins.

programs.name: 6-Week Strength Training Essentials
programs.description: Beginner-friendly strength program teaching safe lifting technique and progressive overload.

programs.name: 4-Week Yoga Reset Series
programs.description: Gentle yoga series designed to improve flexibility, reduce stress, and reintroduce mindful movement.

programs.name: 10-Week Intro to Sprint Triathlon
programs.description: Multi-sport training program covering swim, bike, and run basics for your first sprint triathlon.

program_enrollments.notes: Prefers Wednesday sessions if optional makeup dates are available.
Completed all sessions; indicated interest in intermediate 10K prep.
Works early shifts; may occasionally need to switch days.
Requested extra accountability emails and check-ins.
Cancelled before start date due to schedule change.
Reported significant improvement in flexibility and stress levels.
